AURORA Science Product Gallery Mission About Pre-order

The desk lamp that mirrors the Northern Lights.

AURORA tunes its 8-million-pixel light field to live space-weather telemetry from NOAA SWPC. When the sun flares, your desk does too. A small, calibrated piece of the magnetosphere on your nightstand.

Pre-order $189 How it works →

Live sync

NOAA SWPC's Kp-index feed updates every minute. AURORA's color field updates with it.

Spectrum-true LEDs

Custom 12-channel LED stack reproduces oxygen-green and nitrogen-violet emission lines.

Quiet by default

No notifications, no alerts. AURORA just glows. The room knows when the sun is loud.

Imagery courtesy NASA, public domain. Full citations.
